message:
fix(validation): add input bounds for DoS prevention

- history.ts: Add MAX_EXTRACT_OUTPUT_LENGTH (10MB) and
  MAX_CUSTOM_PATTERN_LENGTH (1000) to limit extraction inputs
- agents.ts, dcg.ts, history.ts: Add MAX_CSV_ITEMS (50) limit
  to prevent unbounded array creation from comma-separated inputs
- messages.ts: Add MAX_CLIENT_MESSAGE_SIZE (1MB) check before
  JSON parsing WebSocket messages

These limits prevent memory exhaustion from malicious or malformed
input while being generous enough for normal operation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
